Curio Archive

Structured historical encyclopedia for Curio Cards (2017 Ethereum NFT series).

Home Cards Artists Timeline Provenance Index On This Day Archive About / Methodology Search

On This Day Archive

Calendar Method

This archive groups dated events by month and day where day-level records are available.

May 9

  • 2017: Collection launch documented. Provides the baseline date for historical ordering of subsequent Curio events.

June 20

  • 2017: Card 17b misprint publication. Introduces a documented variant event reflected in card and contract references.

October 1

  • 2021: Institutional auction record published. Adds externally published institutional documentation to the event record.

Generated: 2026-02-14T17:10:16.165Z

Page Updated: 2026-02-14

Publication standard: factual summary, no speculative inference.
